videos.headline: Dylan Sampson collects his 4th TD for the Vols
videos.description: Dylan Sampson muscles his way in for his fourth touchdown on the day as Tennessee leads 48-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson collects his 4th TD for the Vols) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson gets Tennessee on the board early
videos.description: Joe Milton III swings it out to Dylan Sampson for the score as Tennessee takes a 7-0 lead on the opening drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson gets Tennessee on the board early) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: UVA comes away with early 4th down stop
videos.description: Virginia gets the stop on fourth-and-1 to take over on downs vs. Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UVA comes away with early 4th down stop) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mike Hollins carries the ball for 1st time since UVA tragedy
videos.description: Mike Hollins gets his first carry since the tragic Virginia shooting.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mike Hollins carries the ball for 1st time since UVA tragedy) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: UVA takes over after Tennessee fumbles the punt return
videos.description: Dee Williams can't hold onto the ball during the punt return and Virginia recovers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UVA takes over after Tennessee fumbles the punt return) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mike Hollins leads Virginia out of the tunnel for its opener
videos.description: Mike Hollins, a survivor of the tragic Virginia shooting, leads the Cavaliers out of the tunnel pregame vs. Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mike Hollins leads Virginia out of the tunnel for its opener) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson motors his way for his 2nd Vols TD
videos.description: Dylan Sampson punches it in for his second touchdown as Tennessee leads 14-0 vs. Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson motors his way for his 2nd Vols TD) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Joe Milton III takes it himself for a Tennessee TD
videos.description: Joe Milton III punches it in for the score as Tennessee leads 21-3 vs. Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joe Milton III takes it himself for a Tennessee TD) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Joe Milton III scampers in for his 2nd Vols' TD
videos.description: Joe Milton III takes it in himself for his second touchdown as Tennessee leads 28-3.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joe Milton III scampers in for his 2nd Vols' TD) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson's 3rd TD pads Vols' lead
videos.description: Dylan Sampson scores his third touchdown of the day as Tennessee leads 35-3.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson's 3rd TD pads Vols' lead) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: UVA's Olasunkonmi Agunloye carted off following fumble recovery celebration
videos.description: Virginia's Olasunkonmi Agunloye gets carted off after celebrating a fumble recovery on the sidelines.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UVA's Olasunkonmi Agunloye carted off following fumble recovery celebration) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Perris Jones takes it in for the 1st Virginia TD
videos.description: Perris Jones takes it in for the first Virginia touchdown of the season as they trail 35-10 vs. Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Perris Jones takes it in for the 1st Virginia TD) 2023/9/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jacob Warren snags a Vols TD
videos.description: Joe Milton III finds Jacob Warren for the score as Tennessee leads 42-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jacob Warren snags a Vols TD) 2023/9/2 ESHEET
